summary: Completed PWA and Capacitor setup testing. All 10 requested features verified working: manifest.json, service-worker.js, offline.html, app icons, PWA meta tags in index.html, login flow, admin dashboard, API health, and homepage landing page.

pwa_static_assets: manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with correct metadata (name='RX Expresss - Pharmacy Delivery', display='standalone', theme_color='#0d9488')
service-worker.js accessible with CACHE_NAME, install/fetch event handlers
offline.html accessible with RX Expresss branding and offline message
pwa_meta_tags_in_index_html: viewport fit cover for safe area
authentication: Admin login works with admin@rxexpresss.com / admin123
Pharmacy login works with pharmacy@test.com / pharmacy123
Driver login works with driver@test.com / driver123
homepage_and_dashboard: Homepage loads with RX Expresss branding
Pharmacy Portal and API Documentation buttons visible
Feature cards (Same-Day Delivery, HIPAA Compliant, Real-Time Tracking) displayed
Admin dashboard loads correctly after login with sidebar navigation
pwa_install_prompt: Component not visible on desktop (expected - beforeinstallprompt event only fires on mobile/when criteria met)

critical_code_review_comments: PWA manifest.json properly configured with all required fields (name, icons, display: standalone, theme_color)
Service worker implements cache-first strategy for static assets and network-first for API calls
InstallPrompt component handles both iOS (share button instructions) and Android (beforeinstallprompt) cases
useCapacitor hook properly initializes native plugins (StatusBar, Keyboard, App back button) when running in Capacitor
Capacitor config (capacitor.config.json) correctly configured for iOS/Android build with splash screen and plugin settings
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users and data
context_for_next_testing_agent: PWA setup complete and verified. manifest.json, service-worker.js, offline.html, all icons accessible. InstallPrompt component renders only when beforeinstallprompt event fires (mobile/PWA criteria met) or for iOS devices. Capacitor config set up but native platforms (ios/android folders) not added - requires local Xcode/Android Studio. All auth flows working. Previous features from iteration_17 still functional.

manifest_json.details: Accessible at /manifest.json with correct app metadata, 9 icons, display=standalone, theme_color=#0d9488

offline_html.details: Accessible at /offline.html with offline message and retry button

pwa_icons.details: All icons accessible: favicon.ico, icon-192x192.png, icon-512x512.png, apple-touch-icon.png, maskable icons

pwa_meta_tags.details: index.html contains all required PWA meta tags

login_flow.details: All 3 user roles (admin, pharmacy, driver) can login successfully

admin_dashboard.details: Loads correctly after login with sidebar navigation and dashboard stats

install_prompt_component.details: Component exists with data-testid='pwa-install-prompt'. Not visible on desktop (expected behavior)

homepage_landing.details: RX Expresss branding, feature cards, and portal buttons displayed
